sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A siangtho mahmah mual tungah, meilum a then ciangin ah;
Nisa a vangtanna vakpha, cik le lui
neute tung tu’n;
Sakhi tuihup a vangin ah, itna pha lai kisimta;
Eite kimu dingin a hun,
meiilum a then ciangin ah.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Eite i (eite i) kimu ding hi (kimu ding
hi),
Leitungah (leitungah), kimuh bangin (kimuh bangin);
Tua thupha le lungdamna ni,
Zingsang
a phalvak ciang ah;
Eite kimu dingin a hun, meilum a then ciangin ah

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mihingte
khuamial sungah khial, leitung mi a hih mangngilh;
Phatna dinga hahkatna a, ki-itna thupha
paikhia;
Nopsakna’ng Topa’n hong phel ding, eite khempeuh hong liah ding;
I ngak
dingin zingsang hun hi, meilumte a theng ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Meilumte ei khempeuh tungah, a leentoh
laitakin ah,
I it khempeuh i lawmte tawh, eite i kimu ding maw;
Khuamial cipna gungal khat-ah,
khuavak ni tang hong tung ta;
A lamdang khuavak i muhna, meilum a then ciangin ah.
